MUST: ClassSession MUST have FK to User for tutor limited to user_type='tutor' (RF-005)
ClassSession MUST have FK to User for client limited to user_type='client' (RF-005)
ClassSession status MUST use predefined choices: pending, confirmed, completed, cancelled (RF-005)
ClassSession duration MUST validate minimum 60 and maximum 180 minutes (RF-005)
ClassSession meeting_platform MUST use predefined choices: google_meet, zoom, custom (RF-005)
ClassSession DateTime fields MUST use UTC-5 Ecuador timezone (RF-006)
All models MUST include verbose_name and verbose_name_plural in Meta (RNF-004)
MUST_NOT: ClassSession tutor FK MUST NOT reference users with user_type != 'tutor' (RF-005)
ClassSession duration MUST NOT accept values outside 60-180 minutes (RF-005)
ClassSession MUST NOT allow double-booking for same tutor (RF-006)

MUST: ClassSessionManager MUST implement get_tutor_sessions(tutor, status=None) with select_related (RNF-001)
ClassSessionManager MUST implement get_client_sessions(client, status=None) with select_related (RNF-001)
MUST_NOT: Session query logic MUST NOT be implemented inline in views (RNF-004)

MUST: ServiceArea MUST have unique city_name field (RF-001)
ServiceArea MUST support GIS PolygonField when GIS_AVAILABLE=True (RF-001)
ServiceArea MUST fall back to TextField when GIS_AVAILABLE=False (RF-001)
ServiceArea activo MUST default to True (RF-001)
MUST_NOT: ServiceArea city_name MUST NOT accept duplicate values (RF-001)

out_of_scope: PostGIS in local development — use city name fallback (RF-001 out_of_scope)

MUST: TutorLead MUST store name, email, subject fields (RF-004)
TutorLead MUST maintain expiration in exactly 7 days from creation (RF-004)
MUST_NOT: TutorLead expiration MUST NOT exceed 7 days (RF-004)
